text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Argh! What the crap! I couldn't beat<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dammit, dammit, dammit! Hayahide,you're such a pain in the butt!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Taishin, I...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're right! I most certainly am!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's no fair!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

They suddenly hear Winning Ticket<n>yelling as
they're on the way back to<n>the academy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No fair, no fair, no fair, no faaair!It's not cool how well you two aregetting along!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I wanna race with you guys toooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Uh, you've only got yourself to blame<n>for getting
injured.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Now, now. No need to cry.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The three of us are still in the Twinkle<n>Series.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Which means we can race against<n>each other as
often as we wish to.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! That is right!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, I know! Let's all race in the<n>autumn Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It'll be a BNW reunion!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Are you seriously not embarrassed<n>using that
name?

The three of them vow to race<n>together at the
autumn Tenno Sho<n>before parting ways.
